title: Monster Mod
body:
**Monster Mod** adds whimsical takes on classic gothic horror tropes animated in a modern, Vanilla-like style! It's unfinished...

## Werewolf
- Spawns at night in any **Taiga** 
- Hostile to undead, infighting with Zombies, Skeletons, and Ghosts.  
- Drops 1-5 Bones and Rotten Flesh 

![Ear twitch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78ada9086a08cd9dfa1538ad0ddc460f0bd7a507.gif)

## Ghost
- Spawns at night in the **Dark Forest**
- Drops extra XP

![Ghost floating](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/818def22297e14a5cd5766485c86628a260b34cc.gif)
## Requires **[**Entity Model Features**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/versions)**. 

Silly entity mod made in Mcreator. very alpha! 
It's a core mod for one of my packs, so it's not really all that by itself. One day i may remake it outside of mcreator and add a haunted armor or perhaps some kind of swamp creature
